kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Everyone in the Ironmongers' Guild ranks higher in levy than everyone in the Joiners' Guild.
The artisan in Highrow's levy is immediately below Edmund.
Rowan's levy is immediately below the artisan with the Mallet.
Millpond goes with exactly four of Edmund, Carpenter, Saw, Barrels, and 5 coins.
The artisan who makes Boots' levy is between the artisan in Southgate and the artisan with the Anvil.
Weaver goes with exactly four of Matilda, Mallet, Rope, Oldwall, and 5 coins.
The artisan who makes Tapestries' levy is at least 2 coins more than the artisan with the Awl.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Everyone in the Pike Family ranks higher in weight than everyone in the Sunfish Family.
The angler at Cedarmere's weight is immediately below Cody.
Royce's weight is immediately below the angler using the Spoon.
Pinehollow goes with exactly four of Cody, Bass, Wobbler, Maggot, and 11 lb.
The angler fishing with Minnow's weight is between the angler at Willowmere and the angler using the Crankbait.
Perch goes with exactly four of Gus, Spoon, Nightcrawler, Stillwater, and 11 lb.
The angler fishing with Shrimp's weight is at least 2 lb more than the angler using the Spinnerbait.
